## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Sunbit and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, SEO progress, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX raised VC funding, enabling platform improvements and expanded capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Sunbit seeing positive momentum in organic traffic; 13 new blogs to be posted today](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [B2B content creation (esp. for Dental) to begin soon, including ROI calculator](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
  - [Website improvements (SEO cleanup, nav restructure) underway to boost rankings](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions and Updates

  - [Angel Kemper introduced as Jason's right-hand at Sunbit](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Focuses on social media strategy, marketing ops, automations, GA setup](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
      - [Background in SEO at Reach Local, partnering with Google](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Jakub shared recent/upcoming travel plans (Philadelphia, London)](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [Jason recapped Southwest road trip with parents](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)

### GrowthX Funding and Platform Improvements

  - [Recent VC funding announcement](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Hiring of managing directors and engineering talent](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [Internal platform improvements coming in next 2 months](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [Enhanced self-service capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
      - [Additional tools to add value](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)

### Content Production and SEO Progress

  - [On track to meet monthly word count goals](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=599.0)
  - [21 articles delivered since last meeting](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=599.0)
  - [13 more blogs to be posted today](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [Healthy growth in impressions and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
      - [First significant jump in impressions \~2 weeks ago](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [Indexing speed has increased, possibly due to regular publishing](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)

### Sunbit Website Enhancements

  - [SEO cleanup in progress (e.g., addressing orphan pages, non-indexing)](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [New top-level navigation structure coming](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
      - [Separate consumer and B2B sections](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
      - [Knowledge Center with auto tips, dental tips, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Improved site load times](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)

### B2B Content Strategy

  - [Shifting focus to B2B content, especially for Dental](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [ROI calculator for dental offices in development](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
      - [Shows potential revenue uplift from using Sunbit](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [Built as a flexible module in CMS](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [Potential for repurposing calculator across other content](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
  - [Some B2B articles may have paid promotion](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)

### Content Distribution and Conversion

  - [Adding floating "Find somebody near you" button on blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
  - [Driving action to shop directory](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
  - [B2B content to have different conversion path](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to grant Angel access to Notion](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
  - [Begin research for B2B content topics](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [Continue regular content production and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [Monitor SEO progress and identify successful content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Implement website enhancements (navigation, SEO cleanup)](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
  - [Develop and integrate ROI calculator for dental offices](https://fathom.video/share/1kEfy6U4hiAFKiDeyLv2G8JTLj3BQv8w?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
